taxon.author: C. L. Koch,
taxon.distribution: Azores, Europe, Northern Africa, Turkey, Caucasus, Iraq, Central Asia. Introduced to North America, Chile, Brazil, St. Helena, South Africa, Australia, New Zealand, Hawaii

referenceObject.reference: Koch, C. L. (1838b). Die Arachniden. Fünfter Band. C. H. Zeh'sche Buchhandlung, Nürnberg, pp. 1-124, pl. 145-174 (f. 340-417). doi: 10.5962/bhl.title.43744
